tagline: Weather, water, money, pests, soil and market decisions in one trusted dashboard.
install: Install Farm-in-One to Your Mobile Home Screen for Instant Offline Use
fallbackPrompt: Confirm if crop leaves match a dry color profile.
soilAdvice: Mulch today and irrigate before noon if leaves curl.
readOnlyFinance: Read-only registry. No loan submission is performed.
networkFallback: Data was corrected through fallback mode.
onlineFeatureNote: All feature systems are available online and keep a readable offline fallback.
signInTitle: Sign in to save your farm data, language and dashboard.
signInOffline: Offline mode: saved sign-in will still open
profileSetupSubtitle: These details personalize alerts and stay saved after refresh.
compareKcc: Compare KCC 4% benchmark, co-op rates and risky private offers.
trackWeatherRisk: Track weather risk before PMFBY-style claim preparation.
compareNeem: Compare neem oil, bio-fungicide and soil treatment prices.
planReminders: Plan reminders around harvest and mandi cashflow.
irrigationAdvice: Water availability is steady. Prefer alternate furrow irrigation.
settingsSubtitle: Edit your saved farm details any time.
appDataStoredLocally: Your app data is stored locally on this device and survives refresh.
signOutAndClear: Sign out and clear saved data
apiKeyHelp: Enter your Gemini API key to enable live AI photo diagnostics and voice responses. Otherwise, a smart local offline assistant is used.
aiAssistantSubtitle: Ask me anything about weather, water, finance, pests, or market prices.
aiSpeechUnsupported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser.
aiSpeechError: Voice recognition error. Please try again or type.
aiFarmingOnly: I am specialized in agriculture, weather, mandi prices, and pest control. Let's keep our discussion to farming!
pestsDiagnosticsSubtitle: Upload a crop leaf picture and describe symptoms for immediate treatment recommendations and nearby pesticide shop directions.
symptomsPlaceholder: Describe the leaf spots, color changes, or insect holes here...
diagnosingLoader: Analyzing crop image with AI Doctor...
fertilizerCalcSubtitle: Enter your acreage and crop to calculate exact bags of Urea, DAP, and Potash recommended.
fertilizerAdvice: Apply 50% DAP at sowing/transplanting, and split Urea doses at 21 and 42 days for optimal absorption. Ensure soil has adequate moisture.
weatherAction1: Delay pesticide spray and clear field drains.
weatherAction2: Irrigate early morning if soil is cracking.
weatherAction3: Secure nursery beds and avoid fertilizer broadcast.
weatherAction6: Protect livestock shade and irrigate before noon.
weatherAction7: Watch for fungal pressure after showers.
kccLoanName: Kisan Credit Card benchmark with prompt repayment subvention
gpsPermissionDenied: GPS permission denied. Please enter block name manually.
